corpus_note: Three parallel pairs from distinct corpus regions: early-OT word range (Genesis-Deuteronomy tier, source_node 407371), mid-OT word range (Psalms-Proverbs tier, source_node 442381), late-OT word range (prophets tier, source_node 476273). All node identifiers are ETCBC text-fabric word slots within the BHSA keyspace (400000-500000 range). Self-loops are excluded by design; each pair has distinct source and target identifiers.
